basic_details.job_title: JNCASR R&D Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Jawaharlal Nehru Centre for Advanced Scientific Research (JNCASR)
basic_details.short_information: Jawaharlal Nehru Centre for Advanced Scientific Research (JNCASR) has released the official R&D Assistant Notification 2026 under Advertisement No. ICMS/RD/01/2026-27 on its official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the JNCASR R&D Assistant Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates up to 30 years of age with an M.Sc. in Physics, Chemistry, Materials Science, or Materials Engineering and 2 years of relevant experience can apply through email on or before 15 July 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc in Physics/Chemistry/Materials Science/Materials Engineering with expertise in Advanced Transmission Electron Microscopy and Spectroscopy techniques with 2 years of experience.
qualification.details: M.Sc in Physics/ Chemistry/ Materials Science/ Materials Engineering with expertise in Advanced Transmission Electron Microscopy and Spectroscopy techniques with 2 years of experience.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download JNCASR R&D Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.jawaharlal_nehru_centre_for_advanced_sci: M.Sc in Physics/Chemistry/Materials Science/Materials Engineering with expertise in Advanced Transmission Electron Microscopy and Spectroscopy techniques with 2 years of experience.

content_sections.heading: JNCASR R&D Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the JNCASR Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download JNCASR R&D Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: M.Sc in Physics/ Chemistry/ Materials Science/ Materials Engineering with expertise in Advanced Transmission Electron Microscopy and Spectroscopy techniques with 2 years of experience.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

content_sections.heading: JNCASR R&D Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: JNCASR R&D Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the JNCASR R&D Assistant position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 15th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the R&D Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc degree in Physics, Chemistry, Materials Science, or Materials Engineering, along with 2 years of experience in Advanced Transmission Electron Microscopy and Spectroscopy techniques.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the R&D Assistant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the R&D Assistant post is 30 years. Age relaxation may be applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. How will the candidates be selected for the R&D Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the R&D Assistant position will primarily involve an Online Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the R&D Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the R&D Assistant position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 24,800 per month, plus 30% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies for the R&D Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy announced for the R&D Assistant position in this recruitment drive by JNCASR.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the JNCASR R&D Assistant recruitment is through email. Candidates need to send their complete application and required documents via email.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this JNCASR R&D Assistant recruitment is ICMS/RD/01/2026-27.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the Jawaharlal Nehru Centre for Advanced Scientific Research located?
faq.answer: Jawaharlal Nehru Centre for Advanced Scientific Research (JNCASR) is located in Bengaluru, Karnataka, with the pincode 560064.
